title: mespilus × hiemalis
intro: Mespilus × hiemalis, also known as the hybrid medlar or haw medlar, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the true medlar (Mespilus germanica) and the Asian hawthorn (Crataegus spp.). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mespilus × hiemalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Mespilus × hiemalis can be used to prepare various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
